# Inspection

Run host inspection checks before prepare execution.

## Summary

- kind: `Inspection`
- visibility: `public`
- schema: `../../../schemas/tools/inspection.schema.json`
- category: `prepare`

## When To Use

Use this at the start of prepare workflows to fail early on unsupported hosts.

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-inspection
kind: Inspection
spec:
    checks:
        - example
```

## Realistic Example

```yaml
kind: Inspection
spec:
  checks: [os, arch, swap]
  failFast: true
```
